summary: BC Config Hardening tests completed successfully. 15/15 backend tests passed, 10/10 frontend checks passed. All new BC environment separation features working correctly: /api/admin/bc-config endpoint returns correct diagnostics, /api/settings/status has split bc_environment object with read/write separation, Settings UI shows BC Environment Mode banner with Production/Sandbox split, no secrets exposed in responses.
critical_code_review_comments: bc_config.py properly implements centralized BC configuration with clear READ/WRITE separation
get_diagnostics() in bc_config.py correctly omits all secrets (client_id, client_secret, tenant_id)
Settings UI correctly displays split BC cards and environment mode banner
IS_READ_PRODUCTION flag correctly calculated from BC_READ_ENVIRONMENT
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Config hardening verified. New bc_config.py module is single source of truth for BC environment settings. /api/admin/bc-config endpoint provides safe diagnostics. Settings page shows split Read/Write BC cards with correct environment values (Production for read, Sandbox_11_3_2025 for write).

BC Config Diagnostics (Part 1).GET /api/admin/bc-config: PASS - returns bc_read_environment=Production, bc_write_environment=Sandbox_11_3_2025, writes_enabled=false, mode contains SAFE

Security (Part 11).No secrets in /api/admin/bc-config: PASS - no client_secret, client_id, or full tenant_id exposed

verified_ui_elements.Part 7 - BC Environment Mode Banner: PASS - shows 'BC Environment Mode' with 'Read: Production' in green
verified_ui_elements.Part 8 - Split BC Cards: PASS - 'Business Central (Read Source)' and 'Business Central (Write Target)' cards present
verified_ui_elements.Part 9 - No Sandbox Warning: PASS - no sandbox warning banner shown (correct since read=Production)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live, no mocking. BC API calls fail with auth errors as expected (lab credentials)
